title: Wano Prepares While the World Shakes
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Big Mom, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy as The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
scene: The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.

dialogue.text: We just found out he was alive!

dialogue.text: PLEASE! Tell me this is some kind of joke!

dialogue.text: Fuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuf Fuffu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Fuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuf Fuffu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oi! Boys! To sea!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they're going to be picked up by the marines,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'll just grab 'em first!

dialogue.text: present day somewhere at sea

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's me, Coby.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ah... yes. Let me go somewhere else.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oh yeah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Um... "sea."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: "Mist!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: All that happened?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yes. We can't keep up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even with all the Marines in the world!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, I'm pretty sure that on your end,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As was originally planned, the Marines won't be making any moves.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, we don't even have the men to do so.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Wano Country, Outshirts of EBISU

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because Wano isn't a WG-allied country, huh... that's probably a good thing.

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Anyway, about big mom arriving at Onigashima...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Marines hope that the two will neutralize each other.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I bet. Well, Kaido and big mom were at each other's throats yesterday, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Now they've joined hands.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Marine Ho Top-Secret Special Forces "Sword" Captain X DRAKE

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: wh- whh- whh- whh- whh- whh- whh- whh- wha-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What do you mean?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And about straw hat luffy,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No news of his escape. No developments on that front.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, right. One more piece of bad news.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: the other day, in the capital,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I saw CPO.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WHATA-?! WHY ARE THEY IN WANO?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: i don't want to think about it, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Marine ho rear Admiral, and "word" member COBY

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It seems the government is dealing

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: with this pirate-ruled country.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Honestly, the thought froze me solid for a few minutes when I first realized.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Where are you now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Heading to NYOGashima. To arrest

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The pirate empress, Boa Hancock!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Countries around the world

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Allying with Pirates has always been wrong!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They should have been done away with a long time ago!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hehehe! So the govern- ment's dogs are finally being caged!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: PIRATE EXPRESS? HAWK EYE? CLOWN? HAH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The news that was perhaps the most surprising to the world

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But they're one of the three great powers of the world! Is this okay?!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Before the Raid and World News storyline with 57 dialogue beats. The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
